About PramanCAD

Technical solar design support that keeps your permit pipeline moving.

We focus on clean drafting, accurate electrical documentation, and jurisdiction-ready plan sets so installers can reduce revisions and move faster from design to approval.

PramanCAD Engineering Services is a professional AutoCAD and solar PV design support provider serving U.S. solar installers, contractors, and engineering partners.

Our work is built around practical field understanding, NEC-oriented electrical design, neat CAD presentation, and responsive communication for high-volume solar teams.

  • Residential, commercial, carport, ground mount and battery layouts
  • Permit sheets, roof plans, site plans, elevations, SLD/3LD and labels
  • PE / EE stamp coordination support where required
01

Receive project inputs

Survey, module/inverter details, utility/AHJ notes, and installer requirements.

02

Design & CAD drafting

Layouts, electrical diagrams, structural notes, labels, and permit sheet coordination.

03

Review-ready delivery

Clean plan set output with fast revisions and professional communication.

Our Workflow

Solar permit design process — clear, simple and AHJ-ready.

This step-by-step workflow shows how we move a project from received inputs to final permit-ready delivery.

Project inputs and site data review
PV layout, SLD / 3LD and CAD drafting
NEC and AHJ compliance check
Final permit package delivery

Residential Permit Package

Residential Solar Design

Permit-ready rooftop and home PV design with module layout, roof plan, equipment placement, labels, SLD and AHJ-ready notes.

Request This Service All Services
Detailed Scope

What we prepare for residential solar projects.

For homeowners and residential installers, the page content now focuses only on residential PV permit scope, roof layout, electrical coordination and revision support.

Topic-specific deliverables

Residential Solar Design work is prepared with focused drawings, service-specific notes and clean presentation for the exact project type selected.

  • Roof plan with module layout, fire setbacks, access pathways and attachment spacing.
  • Equipment placement for inverter, combiner, disconnects, meter/MSP and rapid shutdown equipment.
  • Electrical sheet coordination with SLD, labels, placards and NEC 690/705 based notes.

Typical workflow

We keep the process simple so your team can submit inputs, review the package and move quickly toward permit approval.

  • Survey/photos and utility details review
  • Roof geometry, module layout and stringing coordination
  • Permit PDF package and AHJ correction support

Roof & site plan

Roof plan with module layout, fire setbacks, access pathways and attachment spacing.

Module layout

Equipment placement for inverter, combiner, disconnects, meter/MSP and rapid shutdown equipment.

SLD + labels

Electrical sheet coordination with SLD, labels, placards and NEC 690/705 based notes.

Need Residential Solar Design support?

Share the project details, AHJ/utility notes and equipment list. We will prepare the right scope for permit-ready delivery.

  • AHJ-ready documentation flow for projects requiring PE/EE stamp assistance.

We keep the process simple so your team can submit inputs, review the package and move quickly toward permit approval.

  • Confirm AHJ stamp requirement and project scope

Solar Permit Plans work is prepared with focused drawings, service-specific notes and clean presentation for the exact project type selected.

We keep the process simple so your team can submit inputs, review the package and move quickly toward permit approval.

  • Draft permit sheets with CAD standards and clean presentation
  • Deliver PDF/CAD package and support corrections

Detailed Scope

Topic-specific deliverables

Electrical Diagrams work is prepared with focused drawings, service-specific notes and clean presentation for the exact project type selected.

  • SLD/3LD showing modules, inverter, optimizers/microinverters, disconnects, meter and MSP.
  • Breaker, conductor, conduit, grounding, rapid shutdown and interconnection callouts.
  • NEC 690/705 oriented labels, placards and calculation notes for review clarity.

Typical workflow

We keep the process simple so your team can submit inputs, review the package and move quickly toward permit approval.

  • Review equipment datasheets and interconnection method
  • Draft electrical diagram and calculation callouts
  • Revise quickly based on AHJ/utility comments
